tasks.subject: Task 0: Project cleanup, test target, and folder scaffold
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Strip the Xcode template, add a Swift Testing test target, and create the folder scaffold from spec §4. Leaves the app in a buildable, empty-of-features state.

```json:metadata
{"files":["Road Beans/Item.swift","Road Beans/Road_BeansApp.swift","Road Beans/ContentView.swift","Road BeansTests/RepositoryTests/SmokeTests.swift"],"verifyCommand":"xcodebuild -project \"Road Beans.xcodeproj\" -scheme \"Road Beans\" -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17' build test -only-testing:\"Road BeansTests/SmokeTests\"","acceptanceCriteria":["Item.swift deleted","Road_BeansApp.swift no longer references Item","Folder scaffold created","Road BeansTests target exists","Smoke test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Domain enums (PlaceKind, PlaceSource, DrinkCategory, SyncState)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Define the four domain enums with display metadata.

```json:metadata
{"files":["Road Beans/Models/PlaceKind.swift","Road Beans/Models/PlaceSource.swift","Road Beans/Models/DrinkCategory.swift","Road Beans/Models/SyncState.swift","Road BeansTests/RepositoryTests/EnumTests.swift"],"verifyCommand":"xcodebuild -project \"Road Beans.xcodeproj\" -scheme \"Road Beans\" -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17' test -only-testing:\"Road BeansTests/EnumTests\"","acceptanceCriteria":["Four enums defined with display metadata","All conform to String/Codable/CaseIterable/Sendable","RawValue stability tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: SwiftData @Model entities (Place, Visit, Drink, Tag, VisitPhoto, Tombstone)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Define the six SwiftData entities with CloudKit-compatible optional relationships and non-optional domain accessor extensions.

```json:metadata
{"files":["Road Beans/Models/Place.swift","Road Beans/Models/Visit.swift","Road Beans/Models/Drink.swift","Road Beans/Models/Tag.swift","Road Beans/Models/VisitPhoto.swift","Road Beans/Models/Tombstone.swift","Road BeansTests/RepositoryTests/ModelTests.swift"],"verifyCommand":"xcodebuild -project \"Road Beans.xcodeproj\" -scheme \"Road Beans\" -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17' test -only-testing:\"Road BeansTests/ModelTests\"","acceptanceCriteria":["Six @Model entities CloudKit-compatible","Optional relationships with defaults","Domain accessors non-optional","External storage on photo data","Cascade deletes correct"]}
```

